page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A measure for quantifying noise in single-cell Hi-C data.

SUMMARY:Single-cell Hi-C (scHi-C) allows the study of cell-to-cell variability in chromatin structure and dynamics. However, the high level of noise inherent in current scHi-C protocols necessitates careful assessment of data quality before biological conclusions can be drawn.
